sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17750" key="au)toke/rastos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αὐτο-κέραστος</orth>, <sense id="n17750.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">self-mixed,</tr_> i.e. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unmixed,</tr_> properly of light wines that need no water, dub., ibid.</sense> </entryFree>
